title: astragalus cyclophyllos
intro: Astragalus cyclophyllos, also known as the "Greek astragalus," is a perennial plant species in the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help to increase resistance to stress and infection. The medicinal properties of Astragalus cyclophyllos include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it beneficial for health conditions such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and respiratory infections. Astragalus cyclophyllos is commonly prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
